message:
Running command: # Each lib file is ~12MB. Total libs dir = 329MB.
# The step 36 env reads 3 corners = ~37MB of lib files.
# But rchar=220MB suggests it read MORE.
# Maybe the padframe LEF files are being read and they're large.
# Check all LEF files:
grep "TECH_LEF\|CELL_LEF" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl | head -5

echo "---TECH_LEF---"
python3 -c "
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl') as f:
    content = f.read()
import re
tech_lef = re.findall(r'set ::env\(TECH_LEF\) \"(.*?)\"', content)
cell_lef = re.findall(r'set ::env\(CELL_LEF\) \"(.*?)\"', content)
print('TECH_LEF:', tech_lef[:2])
print('CELL_LEF count words:', len(cell_lef[0].split()) if cell_lef else 0)
"
